title: Milky Way Skybox
description: Milky Way skybox but be reversed.Based on FabricSkyboxes mod.
body:
This is a reversed Milky Way space skybox based on the FabricSkyboxes mod. The resource was converted from the Scientific Sky Simulator and currently only provides a night sky effect. Skyboxes for sunrise or rainy weather are not included at this time.

![a part](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FeKYQvEa/images/e3a914d2ac3802aaab220dea451d579bdef25ebd.jpeg)
a part

Need Nuit (formerly FabricSkyboxes) :
https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit
